template.name: Intake
template.parameter: UnitID id, double t0, double t1, double t2, double t3, double t4
template.declaration: // Place local declarations here. clock x;

template.name: ProductionUnit
template.parameter: UnitID id, OutputID supplier1, OutputID supplier2

location.label: x <= 1 && stored[id]' == (output[supplier1] + output[supplier2] - output[id + LEFT] - output[id + RIGHT])

template.name: Outlet
template.parameter: double profit_rate, OutputID supplier1, OutputID supplier2

query.formula: simulate[<=10;1] { stored[0], stored[1], stored[2], stored[3], stored[4], stored[5], stored[6], stored[7], stored[8] }

plot.title: Probability Density Distribution
plot.comment: Parameters: α=0.05, ε=0.05, bucket width=4.4, bucket count=11 Runs: 100 in total, 100 (100%) displayed, 0 (0%) remaining Span of displayed sample: [23, 67] Mean estimate of displayed sample: 45.92 ± 1.802 (95% CI)

plot.title: Probability Distribution
plot.comment: Parameters: α=0.05, ε=0.05, bucket width=4.4, bucket count=11 Runs: 100 in total, 100 (100%) displayed, 0 (0%) remaining Span of displayed sample: [23, 67] Mean estimate of displayed sample: 45.92 ± 1.802 (95% CI)

plot.title: Cumulative Probability Distribution
plot.comment: Parameters: α=0.05, ε=0.05, bucket width=4.4, bucket count=11 Runs: 100 in total, 100 (100%) displayed, 0 (0%) remaining Span of displayed sample: [23, 67] Mean estimate of displayed sample: 45.92 ± 1.802 (95% CI)

plot.title: Cumulative Probability Confidence Intervals
plot.comment: Parameters: α=0.05, ε=0.05, bucket width=4.4, bucket count=11 Runs: 100 in total, 100 (100%) displayed, 0 (0%) remaining Span of displayed sample: [23, 67] Mean estimate of displayed sample: 45.92 ± 1.802 (95% CI)

plot.title: Frequency Histogram
plot.comment: Parameters: α=0.05, ε=0.05, bucket width=4.4, bucket count=11 Runs: 100 in total, 100 (100%) displayed, 0 (0%) remaining Span of displayed sample: [23, 67] Mean estimate of displayed sample: 45.92 ± 1.802 (95% CI)

query.formula: strategy Moneydollars = maxE (O0.profit + O1.profit + O2.profit) [<=100] {} -> {stored[3], stored[4], stored[5], stored[6], stored[7], stored[8]} : <> time>=100
simulate[<=100;1] { O0.profit + O1.profit + O2.profit } under Moneydollars

plot.title: Probability Density Distribution
plot.comment: Parameters: α=0.05, ε=0.05, bucket width=2.2204e-16, bucket count=1 Runs: 100 in total, 100 (100%) displayed, 0 (0%) remaining Span of displayed sample: [221.500004, 221.500004] Mean estimate of displayed sample: ≈ 221.500004

plot.title: Probability Distribution
plot.comment: Parameters: α=0.05, ε=0.05, bucket width=2.2204e-16, bucket count=1 Runs: 100 in total, 100 (100%) displayed, 0 (0%) remaining Span of displayed sample: [221.500004, 221.500004] Mean estimate of displayed sample: ≈ 221.500004

plot.title: Cumulative Probability Distribution
plot.comment: Parameters: α=0.05, ε=0.05, bucket width=2.2204e-16, bucket count=1 Runs: 100 in total, 100 (100%) displayed, 0 (0%) remaining Span of displayed sample: [221.500004, 221.500004] Mean estimate of displayed sample: ≈ 221.500004

plot.title: Cumulative Probability Confidence Intervals
plot.comment: Parameters: α=0.05, ε=0.05, bucket width=2.2204e-16, bucket count=1 Runs: 100 in total, 100 (100%) displayed, 0 (0%) remaining Span of displayed sample: [221.500004, 221.500004] Mean estimate of displayed sample: ≈ 221.500004

plot.title: Frequency Histogram
plot.comment: Parameters: α=0.05, ε=0.05, bucket width=2.2204e-16, bucket count=1 Runs: 100 in total, 100 (100%) displayed, 0 (0%) remaining Span of displayed sample: [221.500004, 221.500004] Mean estimate of displayed sample: ≈ 221.500004
